events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr, born Richard Starkey, celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7th.

angles.name: Ringo's Big Day
angles.copy: Peace and love to Ringo Starr today, as the iconic Beatles drummer celebrates turning 86! What's your favourite Ringo moment?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Sir Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday on July 19th.

angles.name: Rock God's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the legendary Sir Brian May! Guitar hero, astrophysicist, and an absolute rock icon. What's your favourite Queen riff?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Jagger's Milestone
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Mick Jagger turns 83 today. An incredible career spanning decades of rock and roll. What's your favourite Stones track?

events.title: MTV Launched (1981)
events.blurb: On August 1st, 1981, MTV launched with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: MTV's Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember life before music videos? On August 1st, 1981, MTV launched and changed everything, kicking off with The Buggles. What was the first video you ever properly *saw*?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' released (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29th, 1994, which quickly became the fastest-selling debut album in British history.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of British music. What's your top track from that legendary debut?

events.title: Woodstock Festival (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal counterculture event, took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago today, the Woodstock festival kicked off three days of peace, love, and music. Which iconic performance do you wish you'd seen live?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death (1977)
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16th, 1977, at the age of 42.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, who we lost on this day in 1977. His music and legacy continue to inspire generations. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's Death (1996)
events.blurb: Hip-hop icon Tupac Shakur was tragically shot in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996, and died from his injuries on September 13, 1996.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the profound impact of Tupac Shakur, who we lost on this day in 1996. His words still resonate.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's Death (1970)
events.blurb: Legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix passed away on September 18th, 1970, at the age of 27.

angles.name: Remembering Hendrix
angles.copy: Forty-six years since we lost the incomparable Jimi Hendrix. His guitar playing changed music forever. What's your favourite Hendrix track?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' released (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on September 26th, 1969, in the UK, with the US release following on October 1st, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: It's been 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover, those songs... pure magic. What's your go-to track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday on September 7th.

angles.name: Chrissie's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock legend with a voice and attitude that's unmistakable.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday on September 21st.

angles.name: LG's Birthday
angles.copy: Our kid is 54 today! Happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite Liam vocal performance?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released (1971)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released on October 11th, 1971, becoming one of the most influential songs of the 20th century.

angles.name: Imagine's Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon gave us the timeless anthem 'Imagine'. A message of peace that still resonates today.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23rd, 2001, revolutionising portable music with '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: iPod Launch Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember your first iPod? Twenty-five years ago, Apple launched the original, putting a thousand songs in your pocket and changing music forever.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic theme tunes to unforgettable gadgets, what's your favourite Bond film or song? License to thrill us with your answers!

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Legendary Beatles co-founder John Lennon was born on October 9th, 1940, and would have been 86 today.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message of peace live on.
